history.release_notes: Improves recovery from an error state caused by impacts where the power meter reports zero power while reporting non-zero cadence. The error recovery improves the power meter interface to Flight Attendant systems.
Bug Fix - resolved setup calibration issue causing the power meter to become unresponsive until the battery is removed and reinstalled.
Fix for a small percentage of devices that use too much battery in sleep.
Platform updates, future product support, and battery indication corrections.
Improve power accuracy in certain rare edge cases.
Various bug fixes and performance improvements.
